start.speaker: elara
start.text: Good, you came. I've been thinking about how to approach this. The well is the most obvious place to start, but whoever is doing this isn't stupid. They'll have contingencies.

start_2.speaker: elara
start_2.text: I've mapped where the contamination is strongest. It's not just the well — the entire upstream channel from Thornwood is tainted. We need a plan.

options.text: Let's test the well directly. Take samples, analyze them publicly.
We should follow the water upstream secretly. No one needs to know.
I'll investigate alone — you're too recognizable as the village herbalist.
What if we set a trap for the poisoner at the well at night?

direct_approach.speaker: elara
direct_approach.text: Publicly? That's bold. If the poisoner is watching — and they almost certainly are — they'll know we're onto them the moment we start collecting samples.

direct_approach_2.speaker: elara
direct_approach_2.text: On the other hand, it forces their hand. They'll either stop poisoning — which saves lives immediately — or they'll try to destroy the evidence. Either way, they reveal themselves.

options.text: Exactly. Flush them out. We'll be ready.
You're right, that's too risky. Let me think of something else.

direct_plan.speaker: elara
direct_plan.text: All right. I'll gather my testing kit and meet you at the well at midday. Bring something to fight with — if they come for the evidence, I want us both breathing at the end of it.

direct_plan_2.speaker: elara
direct_plan_2.text: One more thing. When we find the poison traces, I'll need an hour to confirm the compound. During that hour, you'll need to keep watch. If anyone tries to approach who isn't a villager drawing water... be ready.

direct_outcome_hint.speaker: elara
direct_outcome_hint.text: I should warn you — the evidence we gather will be public. Everyone will know the crops were poisoned deliberately. That knowledge could cause a panic. Or a witch hunt. Be prepared for the fallout.

covert_approach.speaker: elara
covert_approach.text: Smart. The stream feeds from Thornwood through the old mill channel before reaching the village well. If we follow it at night, we can check each junction without being seen.

covert_approach_2.speaker: elara
covert_approach_2.text: But the forest at night... it's not just dark. The trees move, I swear it. And there are sounds — not animals. Something older. The druid wards haven't been maintained in years.

options.text: We go tonight. The longer we wait, the more people get sick.
Dawn. We follow the stream at first light when the forest is quieter.
Does Brother Maren know anything about the old druid wards?

covert_tonight.speaker: elara
covert_tonight.text: Then meet me at the eastern gate an hour after sunset. Wear dark clothing. And bring a weapon — not for the poisoner. For whatever is in those woods.

covert_dawn.speaker: elara
covert_dawn.text: Cautious. I appreciate that. Meet me at the eastern gate before sunrise. We can cover the whole channel before anyone in the village stirs. Just... don't oversleep. Lives depend on this.

covert_maren_connection.speaker: elara
covert_maren_connection.text: Maren? That man studies everything he can get his hands on — scripture, alchemy, the old ways. He claims it's all for his faith, but I've seen him near the stream at odd hours. Drawing water. Testing it. Just like me.

covert_maren_connection_2.speaker: elara
covert_maren_connection_2.text: Either he's investigating the same thing we are... or he's checking his own handiwork. I don't know which scares me more.

covert_warning.speaker: elara
covert_warning.text: If we find the contamination source, we'll have proof someone is doing this deliberately. That's ammunition — against whoever is behind it. But it also means we'll know too much. Once you see the truth, you can't unsee it.

solo_approach.speaker: elara
solo_approach.text: Too recognizable? I've been studying this water for weeks while the rest of the village prayed and panicked. I KNOW this poison. I know what to look for. You don't.

solo_approach_2.speaker: elara
solo_approach_2.text: But fine. If you think your pride is worth more than my expertise, go ahead. I'll give you my testing kit and my notes. Try not to contaminate the samples.

options.text: You're right. I'm sorry. We should do this together.
I mean it. If the poisoner sees you poking around, you become a target.
[If Fenrick met] Someone already threatened me for asking questions. I won't put you in that crossfire.

solo_reluctant.speaker: elara
solo_reluctant.text: Here. The kit, and my notes on the nightcap root concentrations at each well draw point. The contamination is heaviest at the northwest junction — start there.

solo_reluctant_2.speaker: elara
solo_reluctant_2.text: And... if you find anything dangerous, don't try to handle it alone. Come back. I'll be here. I'll be waiting.

solo_concerned.speaker: elara
solo_concerned.text: Threatened? By whom? ...No, don't tell me. If I don't know, I can't be made to tell. Take the kit. But promise me — if you find the source, you come back alive. This village can't lose anyone else.

trap_approach.speaker: elara
trap_approach.text: A trap. That's... actually brilliant. If the poisoner has to dose the well regularly, they'll come back. We just need to be there when they do.

trap_approach_2.speaker: elara
trap_approach_2.text: I can create a marker — a chemical trace in the well water that's harmless but visible under certain light. If someone adds the nightcap root, the reaction will create a faint glow. We'd see it from a hiding spot nearby.

options.text: Set it tonight. I'll hide near the well and wait.
[If Voss met] We should get Commander Voss's soldiers to help surround the area.
Can we make the poisoner think the well has been purified? Force them to come sooner?

trap_tonight.speaker: elara
trap_tonight.text: I'll prepare the tracer compound. Meet me at the well an hour before midnight. Bring a dark cloak and patience. These things always take longer than you think.

trap_tonight_2.speaker: elara
trap_tonight_2.text: And be prepared for what we might find. If the poisoner is someone we know — someone this village trusts — catching them in the act will shatter everything. Are you ready for that?

trap_voss.speaker: elara
trap_voss.text: Mercenaries? Around the village well at night? That'll cause a panic. But... if the poisoner is armed, we might need backup. Talk to Voss, see if she'll commit two or three soldiers. Quietly.

trap_bait.speaker: elara
trap_bait.text: Yes! If I spread word that I've purified the well with a new herb treatment, the poisoner will need to re-dose it immediately or their whole scheme falls apart. They'll come that very night.

trap_bait_2.speaker: elara
trap_bait_2.text: But there's a risk — if word reaches the wrong person that I'm involved in purifying the water, I become a target. Not just the investigation. Me, personally.

options.text: We'll protect you. The faster we catch them, the safer everyone is.
No. I won't use you as bait. We'll do this the patient way.

bait_confirmed.speaker: elara
bait_confirmed.text: Then I'll start spreading the word at the market this afternoon. By nightfall, everyone will know the well is 'clean.' Including whoever needs it to stay poisoned. Be at the well before sunset. This ends tonight.
